questionText: Você está em uma conversa sobre um filme aclamado pela crítica e quer expressar que ele superou completamente suas expectativas. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It blew me away — I didn't expect it to be that powerful.
options: It blew me away — I didn't expect it to be that powerful.
It was quite good, I must say.
I found it rather acceptable for its genre.
It met my expectations fairly well.

questionText: Você quer recomendar um álbum musical a um amigo dizendo que é uma obra-prima que precisa ser ouvida do início ao fim. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It's a masterpiece — you really have to listen to it from start to finish.
options: It's a masterpiece — you really have to listen to it from start to finish.
It has some good tracks worth checking out.
I'd say it's pretty decent for background music.
You might enjoy a few songs here and there.

questionText: Durante uma discussão sobre séries de TV, você quer dizer que ficou completamente viciado desde o primeiro episódio. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: I was hooked from the very first episode — I couldn't stop watching.
options: I was hooked from the very first episode — I couldn't stop watching.
I watched a couple of episodes and found them acceptable.
The series was somewhat engaging at times.
I managed to finish it despite losing interest midway.

questionText: Você está descrevendo um espetáculo de teatro ao vivo que foi absolutamente emocionante. O que você diz para capturar essa experiência?
correctAnswer: The performance was electrifying — the audience was on the edge of their seats the whole time.
options: The performance was electrifying — the audience was on the edge of their seats the whole time.
The show was reasonably performed and had its moments.
The actors did a satisfactory job overall.
It was an adequate theatrical experience.

questionText: Você quer elogiar um livro dizendo que foi impossível largar depois de começar a ler. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Once I started reading it, I simply couldn't put it down.
options: Once I started reading it, I simply couldn't put it down.
I read it slowly over several weeks.
It was a manageable read with some interesting parts.
I finished it eventually after taking a few breaks.

questionText: Você quer expressar que uma peça musical ao vivo foi tão intensa que fez arrepiar. Como você descreveria isso em inglês?
correctAnswer: It gave me goosebumps — the live performance was absolutely spine-tingling.
options: It gave me goosebumps — the live performance was absolutely spine-tingling.
The concert was fairly pleasant and well-organized.
I found the music somewhat enjoyable.
It was a nice enough performance for the venue.

questionText: Você está recomendando um documentário e quer dizer que ele mudou sua perspectiva sobre o assunto. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It's a real eye-opener — it completely changed the way I see the issue.
options: It's a real eye-opener — it completely changed the way I see the issue.
The documentary was informative to some degree.
It covered the topic in a fairly standard way.
I learned a few new things from watching it.

questionText: Você quer comentar que um filme de terror foi tão assustador que não conseguiu dormir depois. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: It scared the living daylights out of me — I couldn't sleep for days.
options: It scared the living daylights out of me — I couldn't sleep for days.
The film was somewhat unsettling in certain scenes.
I found a few moments mildly frightening.
It was a reasonably tense horror film.

questionText: Você quer dizer a um amigo que uma exposição de arte que visitou foi visualmente deslumbrante. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: The exhibition was visually stunning — each piece took my breath away.
options: The exhibition was visually stunning — each piece took my breath away.
The exhibition had some nice pieces on display.
The artwork was reasonably well-crafted.
I found the gallery moderately interesting.

questionText: Você quer expressar que um show de comédia foi tão engraçado que você não conseguia parar de rir. Como você diz?
correctAnswer: I was in stitches the whole time — it was the funniest show I've seen in years.
options: I was in stitches the whole time — it was the funniest show I've seen in years.
The comedy show had some amusing moments.
I chuckled a few times throughout the performance.
It was a decent stand-up show overall.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um livro de ficção científica fez você pensar profundamente sobre o futuro da humanidade. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: It's a thought-provoking read that really makes you question where humanity is headed.
options: It's a thought-provoking read that really makes you question where humanity is headed.
The book had some interesting futuristic concepts.
It covered the topic of science fiction adequately.
I found the storyline reasonably engaging.

questionText: Você está descrevendo um videogame e quer dizer que ele é tão imersivo que você perde a noção do tempo jogando. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It's incredibly immersive — you lose all track of time once you start playing.
options: It's incredibly immersive — you lose all track of time once you start playing.
The game is quite entertaining for a few hours.
I find it moderately engaging as a pastime.
It has satisfactory gameplay mechanics.

questionText: Você quer elogiar a trilha sonora de um filme dizendo que ela amplificou perfeitamente as emoções das cenas. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: The soundtrack perfectly underscored the emotional weight of every scene.
options: The soundtrack perfectly underscored the emotional weight of every scene.
The music was a reasonable accompaniment to the film.
I noticed the background music in a few scenes.
The score was adequately composed for the genre.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma série de TV foi cancelada prematuramente e que os fãs ficaram frustrados. O que você expressa?
correctAnswer: The show was pulled off the air prematurely, leaving fans bitterly disappointed.
options: The show was pulled off the air prematurely, leaving fans bitterly disappointed.
The series ended after completing its planned run.
Viewers were somewhat surprised by the show's conclusion.
The network decided not to renew it after careful consideration.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um artista está no auge da sua carreira atualmente. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: She's at the top of her game right now — everything she releases turns to gold.
options: She's at the top of her game right now — everything she releases turns to gold.
She is currently producing some reasonable work.
Her recent output has been fairly consistent.
She has been moderately successful in recent years.

questionText: Você quer comentar que uma adaptação cinematográfica não fez jus ao livro original. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: The film adaptation fell far short of the source material — it missed the whole point of the book.
options: The film adaptation fell far short of the source material — it missed the whole point of the book.
The movie was a fairly faithful interpretation of the novel.
The adaptation captured some key elements of the book.
The film was a reasonable cinematic version of the story.

questionText: Você quer expressar que um festival de música foi uma experiência inesquecível que você vai lembrar para sempre. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It was a once-in-a-lifetime experience — I'll treasure those memories forever.
options: It was a once-in-a-lifetime experience — I'll treasure those memories forever.
The festival was a pleasant way to spend the weekend.
I enjoyed the event and would consider attending again.
It was a reasonably well-organized music festival.

questionText: Você está discutindo a influência cultural de um músico e quer dizer que ele redefiniu o gênero. Como você expressa essa ideia?
correctAnswer: He single-handedly redefined the genre and left an indelible mark on popular culture.
options: He single-handedly redefined the genre and left an indelible mark on popular culture.
He contributed meaningfully to the development of his musical style.
His work had a noticeable influence on later musicians.
He was a significant figure within his particular genre.

questionText: Você quer criticar diplomaticamente um filme dizendo que tinha potencial mas foi mal executado. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It had all the makings of a great film, but the execution left much to be desired.
options: It had all the makings of a great film, but the execution left much to be desired.
The film was poorly made and not worth watching at all.
It was an average movie with no particular strengths.
The director did a satisfactory job given the budget.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma peça de teatro subverteu suas expectativas de forma inteligente. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: The play subverted all my expectations in the most delightfully clever way.
options: The play subverted all my expectations in the most delightfully clever way.
The play was different from what I had anticipated.
I was mildly surprised by some elements of the performance.
The play turned out to be somewhat unconventional.

questionText: Você quer expressar que um romance literário explorou temas universais de forma profunda e comovente. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: The novel delves into universal themes with a depth and poignancy that is truly rare.
options: The novel delves into universal themes with a depth and poignancy that is truly rare.
The book addressed some common human experiences in an interesting way.
The story covered several relatable topics throughout its pages.
The author explored some familiar themes with reasonable skill.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um diretor de cinema tem um estilo visual muito distinto e reconhecível. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: His visual style is so distinctive that you can spot his films a mile off.
options: His visual style is so distinctive that you can spot his films a mile off.
The director uses a fairly consistent visual approach in his work.
His films tend to have a recognizable aesthetic.
You can usually tell it's his film after watching for a while.

questionText: Você está em uma discussão sobre arte contemporânea e quer dizer que uma instalação desafiou sua noção de arte. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: The installation genuinely challenged my preconceptions about what art can be.
options: The installation genuinely challenged my preconceptions about what art can be.
The installation was an interesting piece of modern art.
I found the artwork somewhat different from traditional forms.
The piece made me think a bit about the nature of art.

questionText: Você quer elogiar um ator dizendo que ele se entregou completamente ao papel, desaparecendo no personagem. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: He threw himself completely into the role — he utterly disappeared into the character.
options: He threw himself completely into the role — he utterly disappeared into the character.
The actor gave a convincing performance in the lead role.
He portrayed the character with a reasonable degree of authenticity.
His acting was notably good in most of the key scenes.

questionText: Você quer comentar que um músico indie ainda não tem o reconhecimento que merece. Como você expressa essa ideia?
correctAnswer: She's criminally underrated — her talent far outstrips her current level of recognition.
options: She's criminally underrated — her talent far outstrips her current level of recognition.
She is a fairly good musician who deserves more attention.
Her work is underappreciated by mainstream audiences.
She hasn't quite achieved the fame her talent warrants.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um álbum de estúdio marcou uma virada importante na carreira de um artista. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: That album marked a pivotal turning point in his career — it was a complete reinvention.
options: That album marked a pivotal turning point in his career — it was a complete reinvention.
The album represented a change in his musical direction.
He tried a somewhat different sound on that particular record.
The album showed some evolution in his artistic approach.

questionText: Você está discutindo um filme de arte e quer dizer que ele é muito hermético e difícil de acessar para o público geral. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: It's a highly esoteric film — it's unlikely to resonate with mainstream audiences.
options: It's a highly esoteric film — it's unlikely to resonate with mainstream audiences.
The film is somewhat complex and may not appeal to everyone.
It's not a typical commercial movie, so it has a limited audience.
The film is a bit too artistic for most casual viewers.

questionText: Você quer expressar que uma série de TV capturou perfeitamente o espírito de uma determinada época. Como você diz?
correctAnswer: The series perfectly captured the zeitgeist of that era — it felt completely authentic.
options: The series perfectly captured the zeitgeist of that era — it felt completely authentic.
The show accurately depicted many aspects of that period.
The series was set in a historical context and felt realistic.
The show portrayed the time period with reasonable accuracy.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um escritor conseguiu transformar sua experiência pessoal difícil em uma obra literária universal. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: She managed to transmute deeply personal trauma into something with truly universal resonance.
options: She managed to transmute deeply personal trauma into something with truly universal resonance.
She wrote about her personal experiences in a way many readers can relate to.
Her difficult background inspired some meaningful literary work.
She drew on her own life to create an emotionally engaging story.

questionText: Você quer comentar que um festival de cinema trouxe filmes de vanguarda que desafiaram convenções. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: The festival showcased cutting-edge films that pushed the boundaries of the medium.
options: The festival showcased cutting-edge films that pushed the boundaries of the medium.
The festival featured a variety of interesting independent films.
Several unconventional films were shown at the festival.
The festival included films from directors trying new approaches.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um videogame narrativo conseguiu abordar temas filosóficos de forma acessível ao jogador. Como você se expressa?
correctAnswer: The game weaves philosophical questions seamlessly into its narrative without ever feeling heavy-handed.
options: The game weaves philosophical questions seamlessly into its narrative without ever feeling heavy-handed.
The game has an interesting story that includes some thoughtful themes.
The narrative touches on some deep topics in an accessible way.
The game deals with philosophical ideas in a fairly engaging manner.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma obra literária é tão densa e multilayered que requer múltiplas leituras para ser plenamente compreendida. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: It's such a layered and allusive text that it rewards multiple readings — there's always something new to uncover.
options: It's such a layered and allusive text that it rewards multiple readings — there's always something new to uncover.
The book is complex enough to be worth reading more than once.
There are many details in the novel that you might miss on a first read.
The story has enough depth to be enjoyed on different levels.

questionText: Você quer elogiar uma coreografia de dança contemporânea dizendo que ela transcendeu os limites da forma artística. O que você diz?
correctAnswer: The choreography was nothing short of transcendent — it elevated contemporary dance to something almost ineffable.
options: The choreography was nothing short of transcendent — it elevated contemporary dance to something almost ineffable.
The contemporary dance performance was very well executed and moving.
The choreographer created an impressive and original piece.
The dance performance was highly artistic and skillfully performed.

questionText: Você está em uma mesa-redonda literária e quer argumentar que um romance pós-moderno desconstrói deliberadamente as expectativas narrativas do leitor. Como você articula essa ideia?
correctAnswer: The novel deliberately destabilizes readerly expectations by foregrounding its own constructedness.
options: The novel deliberately destabilizes readerly expectations by foregrounding its own constructedness.
The book uses an unconventional structure that challenges the reader.
The author subverts traditional narrative conventions in interesting ways.
The novel plays with form in a way that keeps the reader off-balance.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um cineasta usa o silêncio e o espaço em branco de forma tão eficaz que eles se tornam tão expressivos quanto o diálogo. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: His use of silence and negative space is so masterful that absence becomes as eloquent as presence.
options: His use of silence and negative space is so masterful that absence becomes as eloquent as presence.
The director uses very little dialogue, relying instead on visuals.
Silence is employed effectively throughout the film to create tension.
The film communicates a great deal through non-verbal means.

questionText: Você quer criticar um best-seller comercial dizendo que ele apela à cultura do entretenimento fácil às custas de qualquer profundidade literária. Como você articula isso com sofisticação?
correctAnswer: It panders shamelessly to the lowest common denominator, sacrificing any literary merit for mass appeal.
options: It panders shamelessly to the lowest common denominator, sacrificing any literary merit for mass appeal.
The book prioritizes entertainment value over literary quality.
It's a commercially driven novel that lacks intellectual depth.
The author clearly wrote it for a wide audience rather than critics.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma instalação de arte conceitual é deliberadamente provocativa e existe para perturbar o conforto do espectador. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: The work is intentionally provocative — it's designed to unsettle the viewer and disrupt complacent perception.
options: The work is intentionally provocative — it's designed to unsettle the viewer and disrupt complacent perception.
The installation is meant to be challenging and thought-provoking for viewers.
The artwork aims to make people uncomfortable and question their assumptions.
It's a confrontational piece that deliberately avoids aesthetic pleasure.

questionText: Você quer argumentar em um debate cultural que a distinção entre cultura de massa e alta cultura é cada vez mais obsoleta. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: The dichotomy between high and low culture is increasingly untenable in an age of cultural hybridity.
options: The dichotomy between high and low culture is increasingly untenable in an age of cultural hybridity.
The distinction between popular and elite culture is becoming less relevant today.
High and low culture are increasingly blending together in contemporary society.
The old divide between mass entertainment and serious art no longer holds up.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um compositor contemporâneo conseguiu criar uma síntese radical entre música erudita e elementos de música popular. Como você expressa isso de forma sofisticada?
correctAnswer: His work achieves a radical synthesis of the avant-garde and the vernacular, bridging seemingly irreconcilable traditions.
options: His work achieves a radical synthesis of the avant-garde and the vernacular, bridging seemingly irreconcilable traditions.
He successfully blends classical and popular musical elements in his compositions.
His music combines high-art traditions with influences from popular culture.
He bridges the gap between experimental and mainstream music in innovative ways.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma série televisiva de qualidade elevada marca o início de uma nova era de prestígio para a televisão como meio artístico. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: The series heralds a new era of prestige television, cementing the medium's legitimacy as a serious art form.
options: The series heralds a new era of prestige television, cementing the medium's legitimacy as a serious art form.
The show represents a significant step forward for quality television.
It demonstrates that TV can produce content as good as cinema.
The series raises the bar for what television drama can achieve artistically.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um romance de ficção científica funciona como uma alegoria política incisiva disfarçada de entretenimento de gênero. Como você expressa isso com precisão?
correctAnswer: Beneath its genre trappings, the novel operates as a razor-sharp political allegory.
options: Beneath its genre trappings, the novel operates as a razor-sharp political allegory.
The science fiction novel also contains political commentary.
The book uses its genre framework to explore political ideas.
Despite being science fiction, the novel deals with political themes.

questionText: Você quer expressar que uma retrospectiva de um fotógrafo revelou camadas de significado que não eram aparentes nas imagens individuais. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: Seen together, the photographs reveal a web of interconnected meanings that no single image could convey in isolation.
options: Seen together, the photographs reveal a web of interconnected meanings that no single image could convey in isolation.
The retrospective showed how the photographer's work connects thematically.
Viewing all the photos together provided a richer understanding of his vision.
The exhibition gave context to individual works that enhanced their meaning.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um espetáculo multimídia de vanguarda apagou as fronteiras entre diferentes disciplinas artísticas. Como você expressa isso de forma sofisticada?
correctAnswer: The performance effaces the boundaries between disciplines, dissolving the distinction between visual art, music, and theatre.
options: The performance effaces the boundaries between disciplines, dissolving the distinction between visual art, music, and theatre.
The show combined elements from different art forms in a creative way.
The multimedia performance integrated visual art, music, and theatre effectively.
The piece broke down traditional barriers between artistic disciplines.

questionText: Você quer argumentar que a nostalgia na indústria do entretenimento tornou-se um mecanismo para evitar a inovação criativa. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: Nostalgia has become a crutch for an industry increasingly averse to genuine creative risk-taking.
options: Nostalgia has become a crutch for an industry increasingly averse to genuine creative risk-taking.
The entertainment industry relies too heavily on nostalgia instead of new ideas.
Hollywood tends to favor remakes and reboots over original content.
Nostalgia-driven content has replaced innovative storytelling in mainstream media.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um dramaturgo subverte a forma clássica do teatro para questionar a própria natureza da representação. Como você expressa isso com precisão intelectual?
correctAnswer: The playwright subverts classical theatrical form to interrogate the very nature of representation itself.
options: The playwright subverts classical theatrical form to interrogate the very nature of representation itself.
The dramatist challenges conventional theatrical structures to explore deeper questions.
The play deconstructs traditional stage conventions in intellectually stimulating ways.
The playwright uses unconventional theatrical devices to question artistic representation.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma adaptação recente de uma obra clássica conseguiu recontextualizá-la de forma a torná-la relevante para o público contemporâneo sem trair o original. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: The adaptation recontextualises the source material with remarkable fidelity, rendering it urgently relevant without betraying its essence.
options: The adaptation recontextualises the source material with remarkable fidelity, rendering it urgently relevant without betraying its essence.
The modern adaptation stayed true to the original while making it feel contemporary.
The new version successfully updated the classic work for modern audiences.
It was a faithful and timely reimagining of the original source material.

questionText: Você quer dizer que uma canção conseguiu capturar um sentimento coletivo de uma geração inteira de forma que resiste à análise racional. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: The song crystallised something ineffable about that generation's collective experience — it defies rational analysis.
options: The song crystallised something ineffable about that generation's collective experience — it defies rational analysis.
The song captured the feelings of an entire generation in a powerful way.
It became an anthem that resonated deeply with people of that era.
The track expressed something that many people of that generation felt but couldn't articulate.

questionText: Você está numa crítica de cinema e quer dizer que o final ambíguo do filme recusa qualquer resolução fácil, o que pode frustrar ou satisfazer dependendo do espectador. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: The deliberately ambiguous ending refuses easy resolution, which will either frustrate or liberate the viewer depending on their tolerance for uncertainty.
options: The deliberately ambiguous ending refuses easy resolution, which will either frustrate or liberate the viewer depending on their tolerance for uncertainty.
The open ending leaves questions unanswered, which some viewers may find unsatisfying.
The film ends inconclusively, dividing audiences between those who appreciate it and those who don't.
The ambiguous finale is a bold choice that won't appeal to everyone but rewards patient viewers.

questionText: Você quer dizer que um escritor de ficção conseguiu criar personagens tão complexos que transcendem os estereótipos convencionais. Como você expressa isso?
correctAnswer: Her characters transcend stereotypical conventions, embodying a psychological complexity that rings utterly true.
options: Her characters transcend stereotypical conventions, embodying a psychological complexity that rings utterly true.
The author creates characters that feel realistic and avoid typical clichés.
Her characters are well-developed and don't fall into standard character archetypes.
The characterization is nuanced and avoids obvious categorizations.

questionText: Você quer argumentar que um estilo artístico aparentemente ultrapassado ganhou nova relevância quando reinterpretado através de uma lente contemporânea. Como você articula isso?
correctAnswer: What seemed like an exhausted aesthetic finds surprising new vitality when refracted through contemporary concerns.
options: What seemed like an exhausted aesthetic finds surprising new vitality when refracted through contemporary concerns.
An old artistic style can seem fresh again when applied to modern subjects.
The traditional approach gained new interest when used with current themes.
By applying it to today's issues, an outdated style became relevant again.
